title: Nyra supervisore Codex
rule: Codex deve aggiornare questa checklist man mano che chiude i punti. Finalize blocca se restano item required open.

items.label: Supervisor runtime
evidence: universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-codex-work-supervisor.ts; real session verdict recover->attention after evidence

items.label: Code correction gated
evidence: code_correction.can_write_code_directly=false; mode core_required_patch_proposal on recover/blocked; apply_requires includes Core gate ALLOWED

items.label: Test e smoke
evidence: npm run check:nyra:codex-supervisor; check:nyra:local-governance; check:nyra:action-router; program-map-check READY; real supervisor smoke

items.label: Memoria e finalize
evidence: SHARED_MEMORY events/snapshots/program maps aggiornati; after checkpoint completato; pronto finalize
